 ## IMPORTANT API NOTES
 - set_daily_spend: ops + dev ONLY (not ads, not targeted dev)
-- set_targeted_ad_spend: {channel: {group: $/day}} — REPLACES entire ad config each call
+- set_targeted_ad_spend: {channel: {group: $/day}} — REPLACES ALL ad config each call
+  - Must include ALL channels/groups you want: social_media, search_ads, linkedin, referral_program, content_marketing
 - set_targeted_dev_spend: adds CUMULATIVE per-group quality bonus (persists after stopping)
 - Quality formula: (base + q_shared + q_group_bonus) × tier_multiplier
+  - Tier 2=0.75×, Tier 3=0.90×, Tier 4=1.00×, Tier 5=1.10×
 - Subscription status: 'subscribed' (not 'active')
 - Enterprise turns: thread_type, customer_id, turn_number, sender, day, closed
 - Customers table: group_id, customer_type, created_day (no 'status' column!)
-- research_group: Level 2=$60K, Level 3=$175K (can target any level directly)
+- research_group: Level 2=$60K, Level 3=$175K
